definition: A financial relationship with the subject matter of insurance that gives the insured a right to insure.
example: A homeowner has insurable interest in their property; a stranger does not.
jp: 保険の目的物との経済的利害関係

definition: Both parties must disclose all material facts. Also known as uberrimae fidei.
example: An applicant must disclose a history of flooding at their property.
jp: 告知義務。英米法概念。日本では質問応答義務に変更（2008年）

definition: Restoring the insured to the same financial position as before the loss — no better, no worse.
example: If a 5-year-old laptop worth $500 is stolen, the payout is $500 — not the $1,500 new price.
jp: 実損払い。利得禁止原則の基本

definition: The right of the insurer to recover from a third party responsible for the loss, after paying the claim.
example: After paying a car repair claim, the insurer sues the at-fault driver to recover costs.
jp: 請求権代位。保険法25条

definition: When two or more policies cover the same risk, each insurer pays its proportionate share.
example: Two fire policies each covering 50% of a building share a loss equally.
jp: 重複保険時の各保険者の按分負担

definition: The dominant, operative, and effective cause of a loss.
example: A storm damages a roof, letting rain in — the proximate cause is the storm, not the rain.
jp: 因果関係の判断基準。相当因果関係説との関連

definition: A fundamental term in the insurance contract that must be strictly complied with. Breach entitles the insurer to avoid liability from the date of breach.
jp: 英米法特有。日本の保険法に直接の対応概念なし

definition: Any fact that would influence the judgment of a prudent insurer in assessing a risk.
jp: 告知すべき重要な事実

definition: The amount paid by the insured to the insurer in exchange for insurance coverage.
jp: 契約者が支払う対価

definition: The maximum amount payable by the insurer under the policy.
jp: 保険者が支払う上限額

definition: The amount the insured must bear before the insurer pays. Also called excess.
jpTerm: 免責金額（ディダクティブル）
jp: 自己負担額。SGでは'excess'とも呼ぶ

definition: The first portion of a loss borne by the insured. Same as deductible in Singapore context.
jp: 免責金額の英国式表現。SGではdeductibleと同義

definition: A temporary document confirming insurance coverage before the policy is issued. Valid for 30–60 days typically.
jp: 保険証券発行前の暫定的な付保証明

definition: A document that amends the terms of an existing insurance policy.
jp: 保険契約内容の変更・追加書類

definition: Insurance purchased by an insurer to transfer part of its risk to another insurer (reinsurer).
jp: 保険者が自己のリスクの一部を他の保険者に移転

definition: Sharing of a risk among two or more insurers, each accepting a defined proportion.
jp: 複数の保険者がリスクを分担

definition: Reinsurance arranged on a case-by-case basis for individual risks. The reinsurer has the faculty (option) to accept or decline.
jp: 個別リスクごとに手配する再保険

definition: A standing agreement where the reinsurer automatically accepts a defined share of all qualifying risks.
jp: 包括的な再保険契約。自動的に出再

definition: The process of evaluating and accepting risks, and determining appropriate premiums.
jp: リスク評価・引受判断・料率算定のプロセス

definition: A formal request by the insured to the insurer for payment under the policy.
jp: 保険事故発生時の給付請求

definition: An independent professional who investigates and assesses claims on behalf of the insurer.
jp: 保険者の委託を受けて損害調査を行う専門家

definition: An intermediary who acts on behalf of the insured to arrange insurance. Owes a duty of care to the client.
jpTerm: 保険仲立人（ブローカー）
jp: 顧客側に立って保険契約を媒介する者

definition: An intermediary who represents and acts on behalf of the insurer to sell insurance products.
jp: 保険会社の委託を受けて募集を行う者

definition: Monetary Authority of Singapore — the integrated financial regulator and central bank of Singapore.
jpTerm: シンガポール金融管理局
jp: 金融庁＋日本銀行の機能を兼ねる統合型規制当局

definition: The principal legislation governing all insurance business in Singapore, including licensing, conduct, and prudential requirements.
jp: SGの保険業全般を規律する基本法。日本の保険業法に相当

definition: Financial Industry Disputes Resolution Centre — provides free and independent dispute resolution for consumers against financial institutions.
jpTerm: 金融紛争解決センター
jp: 日本のそんぽADRセンター・生保相談所に相当

definition: Personal Data Protection Act — Singapore's data protection law governing collection, use, and disclosure of personal data.
jp: 日本の個人情報保護法に相当。Do Not Call規定あり

definition: Work Injury Compensation Act — provides no-fault compensation for work-related injuries and occupational diseases in Singapore.
jp: 日本の労災保険法に相当。無過失責任制度

definition: A voluntary sacrifice or expenditure to save a vessel and cargo from common peril, shared proportionally among all parties.
jp: 商法788条以下。ヨーク・アントワープ規則に基づく

definition: A partial loss borne solely by the owner of the damaged property, not shared among other parties.
jp: 共同海損と対比される概念。損害を受けた者のみが負担

definition: Contractors' All Risks — comprehensive insurance covering property damage and third-party liability during construction projects.
jp: 工事物件・第三者賠償を包括的に補償

definition: Business Interruption — insurance covering loss of gross profit due to an insured peril causing material damage.
jp: 営業中断による逸失利益を填補

definition: Requirement that a valid property policy must respond to a loss as a condition for a BI claim.
jp: 利益保険の支払いに物的損害保険の付保が必須

definition: Directors and Officers liability insurance protecting company leaders against personal liability for wrongful acts in their capacity.
jpTerm: 会社役員賠償責任保険
jp: Side A/B/C構造。2021年会社法改正で開示規制強化

definition: Product Liability insurance covering claims arising from bodily injury or property damage caused by defective products.
jp: PL法（製造物責任法）に基づく賠償を填補

definition: Group Personal Accident insurance — provides 24-hour accident coverage for a group of employees.
jp: 業務内外の事故を24時間補償

definition: Third Party Only — the minimum compulsory motor insurance in Singapore under the Motor Vehicles Act.
jp: SGの最低限の自動車強制保険。日本の自賠責は対人のみ

definition: Third Party, Fire and Theft — motor insurance covering TPO plus fire and theft of the insured's own vehicle.
jp: TPOに自車の火災・盗難を追加したカバー

definition: Insurance against financial loss caused by dishonest or fraudulent acts of employees.
jp: 従業員の不正行為による損失を填補

definition: The risk that an insured may behave more recklessly because they have insurance coverage.
jp: 保険の存在が被保険者の行動を変えるリスク

definition: The tendency for higher-risk individuals to seek insurance more than lower-risk individuals.
jp: リスクの高い者ほど保険に加入しやすい傾向

definition: A specific peril, condition, or circumstance expressly not covered by the policy.
jp: 保険金支払いの対象外となる事由

definition: A condition that must be fulfilled before the insurer's liability attaches or before a claim can be paid.
jp: 保険者の責任発生の前提条件

definition: Damaged property recovered after a claim has been paid. The insurer may sell it to reduce the net loss.
jp: 保険金支払い後に回収された損害物

definition: The amount of risk an insurer keeps for its own account, not ceded to a reinsurer.
jp: 再保険に出さず自社で保有するリスク額

definition: An insurer that transfers (cedes) risk to a reinsurer under a reinsurance arrangement.
jp: 再保険に出す側の保険者

definition: MAS Notice on Minimum Entry and Examination Requirements for Representatives of Insurance Brokers.
jp: 保険ブローカーの最低基準・継続教育要件を規定

definition: Certificate in General Insurance — the qualification comprising BCP + PGI or BCP + ComGI, required for insurance broking.
jp: SG損保ブローカーの必須資格。BCPが基礎、ComGIが法人損保

definition: Fairness, Ethics, Accountability, Transparency — MAS guidelines for responsible use of AI and data analytics in finance.
jp: 金融分野のAI利用に関するMASガイドライン

definition: The maximum total amount an insurer will pay for all claims during a policy period.
jp: 保険期間中の累計支払上限

definition: Policy responds to losses that occur during the policy period, regardless of when the claim is reported.
jp: 保険期間中に発生した事故が対象。claims-madeとの対比

definition: Shifting the financial consequences of a risk from one party to another, typically through insurance.
jp: 保険の最も基本的な機能

definition: Deliberately retaining a risk and self-funding any losses, often via deductibles or self-insurance.
jp: 保険に頼らず自己資金で損失を負担する選択

definition: Eliminating exposure to a risk entirely by not engaging in the activity.
jp: リスクのある活動自体を行わないこと

definition: Taking measures to reduce the frequency or severity of potential losses.
jp: 損失の頻度・規模を減らす措置（スプリンクラー設置等）

definition: A risk with only the possibility of loss or no loss — no chance of gain. Insurable.
jp: 損失のみが生じる可能性のあるリスク。保険の対象

definition: A risk involving the possibility of either gain or loss. Generally not insurable.
jp: 利益も損失もありえるリスク。原則として保険の対象外

definition: A risk affecting a large number of people and arising from causes beyond any individual's control (e.g. earthquake, war).
jp: 地震・戦争等、広範囲に影響する不可抗力的リスク

definition: A risk arising from individual actions or circumstances, affecting specific persons or properties.
jp: 個人の行為・状況に起因する個別のリスク

definition: The cause of a loss — e.g. fire, flood, theft, collision.
jp: 損害の原因となる事象（火災・洪水・盗難等）

definition: A condition that increases the likelihood or severity of a loss from a given peril.
jp: 危険事故の発生確率・損害規模を高める条件

definition: A tangible condition that increases risk — e.g. faulty wiring, poor building construction, hazardous materials.
jp: 配線不良・建物の構造的欠陥など、物理的な危険増加要因

definition: The two essential elements forming a valid contract — one party makes an offer, the other accepts it.
jp: 契約成立の基本要件

definition: Something of value exchanged between parties to make a contract legally binding. In insurance, the premium.
jp: 英米契約法の概念。保険では保険料がこれにあたる

definition: The legal ability of a party to enter into a binding contract — must be of age and sound mind.
jp: 契約締結に必要な法的能力（年齢・精神状態）

definition: Meeting of the minds — both parties must agree on the same terms for a valid contract.
jp: 契約当事者間の合意。錯誤があると契約は無効になりうる

definition: A contract with no legal effect from the outset — treated as if it never existed.
jp: 最初から法的効力を持たない契約

definition: A valid contract that one party has the right to affirm or avoid due to a defect (e.g. misrepresentation).
jp: 瑕疵により一方当事者が取消権を有する契約

definition: A false statement of a material fact made by the insured during the formation of the contract.
jp: 契約締結時の重要事実に関する虚偽の申告

definition: Failure to disclose a material fact that the insured knew or ought to have known.
jp: 重要事実の不告知。契約解除事由となりうる

definition: The obligation on both parties to disclose all material facts before and during the insurance contract.
jp: 最大善意の原則に基づく情報開示義務

definition: When a principal's conduct leads a third party to reasonably believe an agency relationship exists.
jp: 本人の行為により代理関係の外観が生じた場合

definition: The apparent authority an agent has based on the principal's representations to third parties.
jp: 本人の言動から第三者が合理的に推定できる代理権の範囲

definition: The authority expressly or impliedly granted to an agent by the principal.
jp: 本人が代理人に明示的・黙示的に与えた権限

definition: A duty of trust and loyalty owed by an agent to the principal, requiring the agent to act in the principal's best interest.
jp: 代理人が本人に対して負う忠実義務・善管注意義務

definition: The legal obligation to exercise reasonable care to avoid causing harm to others.
jp: 合理的な注意を払って他者に損害を与えないようにする法的義務

definition: Liability imposed on one party for the acts of another — e.g. employer liable for employee's negligence in course of employment.
jp: 被用者の不法行為について使用者が負う責任。民法715条

definition: The time limit within which legal proceedings must be commenced. In Singapore, typically 6 years for contract.
jp: 訴訟提起の時効期間。SGでは契約は通常6年

definition: A document completed by the applicant providing information needed by the insurer to assess the risk.
jp: 保険申込みの際にリスク情報を記載する書類

definition: The section of a policy containing specific details — insured's name, sum insured, premium, period, etc.
jp: 被保険者名・保険金額・保険料・期間等の個別情報

definition: The standard terms, conditions, and exclusions that form the body of the insurance contract.
jp: 保険契約の標準的な条項・条件・免責事項

definition: A summary document confirming that insurance coverage is in force, often provided to third parties.
jp: 保険が有効であることを第三者に証明する書類

definition: Notification sent by the insurer inviting the insured to renew the policy before expiry.
jp: 保険期間満了前に送付される更新のご案内

definition: A period after the premium due date during which the policy remains in force despite non-payment.
jp: 保険料未払いでも保障が継続する猶予日数

definition: A provision allowing either party to cancel the policy, subject to specified notice and premium refund terms.
jp: 保険契約の中途解約に関する条項

definition: A condition imposed by the insurer that must be met after inception for cover to remain valid.
jp: 契約成立後に履行すべき条件（調査完了・書類提出等）

definition: A condition that must be fulfilled after a loss for the insurer to be liable — e.g. timely notification.
jp: 損害発生後に履行すべき条件（速やかな通知等）

definition: Policy responds only to claims first made during the policy period, regardless of when the event occurred.
jp: 保険期間中に請求がなされた案件が対象

definition: The insured's obligation to promptly inform the insurer of any event that may give rise to a claim.
jp: 損害発生を速やかに保険者に通知する義務

definition: Documentation provided by the insured to substantiate the claim — invoices, photographs, reports, etc.
jp: 保険金請求を裏付ける書類（請求書・写真・報告書等）

definition: A notice from the insurer stating it will investigate a claim without waiving its right to deny coverage.
jp: 保険者が免責の権利を留保したまま調査を進める旨の通知

definition: A voluntary payment made by the insurer even though the claim may not be strictly covered by the policy.
jp: 約款上の支払義務がなくても善意で行う支払い

definition: A claim based on deliberate misrepresentation or dishonesty. Voids the claim and may void the entire policy.
jp: 故意の虚偽・不正に基づく保険金請求。契約無効の原因

definition: The insured's duty to take reasonable steps to minimize the extent of loss after an insured event.
jp: 損害発生後に合理的な損害拡大防止措置を取る義務

definition: A professional engaged by the insured (not the insurer) to prepare and negotiate the claim.
jpTerm: 損害鑑定人（被保険者側）
jp: 被保険者側に立って保険金請求を準備・交渉する専門家

definition: A professional who inspects and reports on risks or losses for underwriting or claims purposes.
jp: リスク調査や損害調査を行う専門家

definition: The reinsurer shares a fixed percentage of premiums and losses with the ceding company.
jp: 保険料と損害を一定割合で分担する再保険

definition: The reinsurer pays only when losses exceed a specified threshold (retention).
jp: 損害が一定額を超えた場合にのみ再保険者が支払う

definition: A proportional treaty where the reinsurer accepts a fixed percentage of every risk written by the ceding company.
jp: 全契約の一定割合を自動的に出再する比例再保険

definition: A proportional treaty where only the portion of a risk exceeding the insurer's retention is ceded.
jp: 保有額を超える部分のみを出再する比例再保険

definition: Non-proportional reinsurance where the reinsurer pays losses exceeding the ceding company's specified retention.
jp: 損害が保有額を超えた部分を再保険者が負担

definition: Non-proportional reinsurance that caps the ceding company's total losses in a given period.
jp: 一定期間の累計損害率が閾値を超えた場合に発動

definition: Reinsurance of reinsurance — a reinsurer ceding part of its assumed risks to another reinsurer.
jp: 再保険者がさらに別の再保険者にリスクを移転

definition: A periodic report from the ceding company to the reinsurer listing individual risks, premiums, and claims.
jp: 出再者が再保険者に提出するリスク・保険料・損害の明細報告

definition: A marketplace where syndicates of underwriters accept insurance risks. Not an insurance company itself.
jp: 保険引受のマーケットプレイス。保険会社ではなく市場

definition: An insurance company that issues policies directly to policyholders (as opposed to a reinsurer).
jp: 保険契約者に直接保険証券を発行する保険会社

definition: An insurer authorized to write both life and general insurance. Prohibited in Singapore under the Insurance Act.
jp: 生保・損保の両方を引き受ける保険者。SGでは禁止

definition: A subsidiary created by a parent company to insure its own risks, often domiciled in a tax-favorable jurisdiction.
jp: 親会社のリスクを引き受けるために設立された子会社

definition: Islamic insurance based on mutual cooperation. Participants contribute to a fund that compensates members for losses.
jpTerm: タカフル（イスラム保険）
jp: 相互扶助の原則に基づくイスラム保険。SGでも提供あり

definition: General Insurance Association of Singapore — the trade body representing general insurers in Singapore.
jpTerm: シンガポール損害保険協会
jp: 日本の日本損害保険協会に相当する業界団体

definition: Singapore Insurance Brokers' Association — represents the interests of insurance brokers in Singapore.
jpTerm: シンガポール保険ブローカー協会
jp: 保険仲立人の業界団体

definition: MAS framework requiring insurers to hold capital proportionate to their risk exposure.
jpTerm: リスクベース資本規制
jp: リスク量に応じた資本保有を義務付けるMAS規制

definition: Legislation regulating financial advisory services in Singapore, including insurance advice.
jp: 金融助言業務を規制するSGの法律

definition: MAS initiative requiring financial institutions to embed fair dealing outcomes for customers in their corporate culture.
jp: 顧客に対する公正な取引をMASが金融機関に求める方針

definition: The obligation of a broker or FA to recommend the most suitable product for the client's needs.
jp: 顧客のニーズに最も適した商品を推薦する義務

definition: A systematic assessment of the client's risk exposures and insurance requirements before recommending products.
jp: 商品推薦前に顧客のリスクと保険ニーズを体系的に評価

definition: A situation where a broker's personal interest may compromise their duty to act in the client's best interest.
jp: ブローカーの個人的利害が顧客利益と対立する状況

definition: Anti-Money Laundering / Countering the Financing of Terrorism — regulations financial institutions must comply with.
jpTerm: マネロン・テロ資金対策
jp: 金融機関に課されるマネーロンダリング・テロ資金対策規制

definition: Know Your Customer — the process of verifying the identity of clients and understanding their financial dealings.
jp: 顧客の本人確認と取引目的の把握。犯罪収益移転防止法に相当

definition: MAS requirements that persons in key positions at financial institutions must meet — honesty, competence, financial soundness.
jp: 金融機関の要職者に求められるMASの適格性基準

definition: Continuing Professional Development — mandatory ongoing training hours for insurance professionals under MAS rules.
jp: 保険専門職に義務付けられる継続研修。年間最低時間あり

definition: The standards of behavior expected of insurance market participants in their dealings with customers.
jp: 保険市場参加者に期待される顧客対応の行動基準

definition: MAS's framework for assessing the culture and practices of financial institutions beyond just financial metrics.
jpTerm: バランスト・スコアカード
jp: MASが金融機関の文化・慣行を評価する包括的フレームワーク

definition: Insurance covering loss or damage to property caused by fire and specified perils such as lightning and explosion.
jp: 火災および指定危険による物的損害を補償

definition: Property insurance covering all perils except those specifically excluded — broader than named perils.
jp: 除外危険以外の全ての危険を補償。指定危険方式より広い

definition: A policy that only covers specific perils expressly listed in the policy wording.
jp: 約款に明記された特定の危険のみを補償する方式

definition: The cost of replacing or restoring damaged property to its condition when new, without deduction for depreciation.
jp: 減価償却を差し引かず新品同様に復旧する費用

definition: The value of property at the time of loss, taking into account depreciation and wear and tear.
jp: 損害発生時点の減価償却後の価値

definition: A pre-agreed value stated in the policy, accepted by both insurer and insured as the basis for claims settlement.
jp: 保険者・被保険者が合意した評価額。損害時にこの額が基準

definition: If the sum insured is less than the actual value, claims are reduced proportionally. Also called the average clause.
jp: 保険金額が実際の価値に不足する場合、按分で支払い

definition: A policy where the sum insured is deliberately set below the full value, but claims up to that amount are paid in full without averaging.
jp: 保険金額を全額価値より低く設定し、按分を適用しない方式

definition: A method of applying average where the sum insured is based on reinstatement value at policy inception, with automatic uplift for inflation.
jp: 契約日の再調達価額を基準とし、インフレ調整を自動付与

definition: A policy where the premium is adjusted periodically based on the insured's declared values (e.g. stock levels).
jp: 在庫高等を定期申告し、保険料を事後精算する方式

definition: The improvement in the insured's position beyond pre-loss condition. Insurers may deduct for betterment.
jp: 修復で損害前より良くなった場合、その差額は被保険者負担

definition: A clause allowing the sum insured to be automatically restored after a claim, in return for additional premium.
jpTerm: 保険金額自動復元条項
jp: 保険金支払い後に保険金額を自動的に元に戻す特約

definition: Damage caused by accidental discharge from a sprinkler system, often covered as an additional peril.
jp: スプリンクラーの誤作動・破損による水損害

definition: In BI insurance, revenue minus variable costs (uninsured working expenses). Different from accounting gross profit.
jpTerm: 粗利益（利益保険上の定義）
jp: 収入から非付保変動費を控除したもの。会計上の粗利とは異なる

definition: The period starting from the date of damage during which BI loss is measured. Selected by the insured at inception.
jp: 損害発生から営業復旧までの損失算定期間

definition: The longest period for which the BI policy will respond, chosen at inception (e.g. 12, 24, or 36 months).
jp: 利益保険が支払う最長期間（12/24/36ヶ月等）

definition: Fixed costs that continue regardless of business interruption — e.g. rent, salaries, rates.
jp: 営業中断中も継続する固定的支出（賃料・給与等）

definition: Additional expenditure incurred to maintain business operations during the indemnity period after a loss.
jp: 損害後に営業を継続するための追加的支出

definition: In BI, any reduction in standing charges due to the interruption is deducted from the claim.
jp: 営業中断により固定費が節約された場合、その分を控除

definition: Cover for loss of amounts owed to the insured when records are destroyed and debts cannot be collected.
jp: 帳簿の毀損で回収不能となった債権の損害を補償

definition: Insurance covering the insured's legal liability for bodily injury or property damage to third parties.
jp: 第三者の身体傷害・財物損壊に対する法的賠償責任を補償

definition: Insurance covering an employer's legal liability for work-related injury or illness suffered by employees.
jp: 従業員の業務上の傷害・疾病に対する使用者の法的賠償責任

definition: Insurance protecting professionals against claims for financial loss caused by their negligent acts, errors, or omissions.
jpTerm: 専門職業賠償責任保険
jp: 専門家の過失・誤謬による顧客の経済的損失を補償

definition: Failure to exercise the standard of care that a reasonable person would in the same circumstances, resulting in harm.
jp: 合理的な注意を怠り他者に損害を生じさせること

definition: Where the claimant's own negligence contributed to the loss, reducing the damages recoverable.
jp: 被害者側の過失により損害賠償額が減額される

definition: A defence meaning 'to a willing person, no injury is done' — the claimant voluntarily assumed the risk.
jp: 被害者が自発的にリスクを引き受けた場合の免責事由

definition: The duty of care owed by an occupier of premises to persons who enter the premises.
jp: 施設の占有者が入場者に対して負う注意義務

definition: In claims-made policies, the date from which prior acts are covered. Claims arising from events before this date are excluded.
jp: 損害賠償請求方式の遡及適用開始日

definition: A period after a claims-made policy expires during which claims can still be reported for events during the policy period. Also called 'tail cover'.
jpTerm: 延長報告期間（テイルカバー）
jp: 契約終了後も一定期間、保険期間中の事象について請求可能

definition: Insurance covering losses from data breaches, cyber attacks, and other technology-related risks.
jp: データ漏洩・サイバー攻撃等のIT関連リスクを補償

definition: Liability assumed by a party under the terms of a contract, as opposed to liability imposed by law.
jp: 法律ではなく契約条項により引き受けた賠償責任

definition: The widest motor cover — includes TPO, own damage, fire, theft, and personal accident benefits.
jp: 対人対物＋車両＋火災盗難＋搭乗者傷害を網羅

definition: No Claim Discount — a premium discount for claim-free years. In Singapore, up to 50% for private cars.
jp: 無事故年数に応じた保険料割引。SGでは最大50%

definition: An agreement between motor insurers where each pays its own policyholder's claim regardless of fault, to speed settlement.
jpTerm: ノック・フォー・ノック協定
jp: 過失にかかわらず各保険者が自社の被保険者の損害を支払う協定

definition: An organization in Singapore that compensates victims of road accidents caused by uninsured or untraced drivers.
jp: 無保険車両・ひき逃げ事故の被害者を救済する機関

definition: Singapore legislation making third-party motor insurance compulsory for all motor vehicles used on roads.
jp: 道路使用車両に対人対物保険を義務付けるSGの法律

definition: A licence required to register a vehicle in Singapore, obtained through a bidding system. Affects insured value.
jp: SG独自の車両登録制度。入札制で保険金額にも影響

definition: Optional add-on covering repair or replacement of windscreen damage, usually with a separate excess.
jp: フロントガラスの修理・交換を補償するオプション特約

definition: Insurance covering goods in transit by sea, air, or land against loss or damage during transportation.
jp: 輸送中の貨物の滅失・損傷を補償

definition: Insurance covering physical damage to the vessel itself and its machinery.
jp: 船舶本体と機関の物的損害を補償

definition: The widest standard cargo cover — all risks of loss or damage except specified exclusions.
jp: 最も広い標準貨物補償。除外危険以外の全リスクをカバー

definition: Mid-range cargo cover — covers named perils including fire, explosion, vessel sinking, overturning, derailment.
jp: 中間的な補償範囲。火災・爆発・沈没・転覆等の列挙危険

definition: The narrowest standard cargo cover — covers major perils like sinking, stranding, collision, and fire only.
jp: 最も狭い補償範囲。沈没・座礁・衝突・火災等の主要危険のみ

definition: International Commercial Terms (ICC) defining responsibilities for shipping, insurance, and customs between buyer and seller.
jp: 売主・買主間の運送・保険・通関の責任分担を定める国際規則

definition: Cost, Insurance and Freight — seller arranges and pays for shipping and insurance to the destination port.
jp: 売主が仕向港までの運賃・保険料を負担

definition: Free on Board — buyer bears the risk and cost of insurance from the point goods are loaded on the vessel.
jp: 貨物が本船に積み込まれた時点で危険が買主に移転

definition: A standing marine cargo arrangement covering all shipments during the period, with declarations made for each.
jp: 期間中の全出荷を包括的にカバーし、個別に通知する契約

definition: Transit clause covering goods from the time they leave the origin warehouse until arrival at the destination warehouse.
jp: 出発倉庫から到着倉庫までの全輸送区間を補償

definition: The deliberate throwing overboard of cargo to lighten a vessel in distress and save it from peril.
jp: 船舶の危険を回避するために貨物を故意に海中投棄すること

definition: Wrongful or fraudulent act by the master or crew of a vessel against the owner's interest.
jpTerm: 船長・乗組員の不正行為
jp: 船長または乗組員が船主の利益に反して行う不正行為

definition: The reward payable to those who voluntarily save a vessel or its cargo from maritime peril.
jp: 海上の危難から船舶・貨物を自発的に救助した者への報酬

definition: Protection and Indemnity — mutual insurance covering shipowners' third-party liabilities (crew injury, pollution, cargo damage).
jp: 乗組員傷害・汚染・貨物損害等の船主の第三者賠償責任を補償

definition: Insurance covering physical damage to aircraft.
jp: 航空機本体の物的損害を補償

definition: Insurance covering the operator's liability for passenger injury, cargo damage, and third-party bodily injury/property damage.
jp: 旅客傷害・貨物損害・第三者損害に対する運航者の賠償責任

definition: Erection All Risks — insurance for the installation/erection of machinery, plant, and steel structures.
jp: 機械・プラント・鉄骨構造物の据付工事を補償

definition: Insurance covering sudden and unforeseen damage to machinery from internal causes (e.g. electrical fault, mechanical failure).
jp: 機械の内部的原因（電気的・機械的故障）による突発的損害

definition: Insurance covering explosion or collapse of boilers and pressure vessels.
jpTerm: ボイラー・圧力容器保険
jp: ボイラーや圧力容器の爆発・破裂を補償

definition: All risks cover for computers, servers, and other electronic equipment against sudden and unforeseen damage.
jpTerm: 動産総合保険（電子機器）
jp: コンピュータ・サーバー等の突発的損害をオールリスクで補償

definition: A guarantee that a contractor will complete the project as per contract terms. Typically 5–10% of contract value.
jp: 請負者の契約履行を保証。通常は契約金額の5〜10%

definition: A guarantee protecting the employer's advance payment to a contractor in case the contractor defaults.
jp: 請負者の債務不履行時に前払金の返還を保証

definition: A guarantee that a bidder will enter into the contract if awarded. Typically 2–5% of bid value.
jp: 落札者が契約を締結することを保証。通常は入札額の2〜5%

definition: A period after project completion during which the contractor must rectify any defects. CAR policies often extend to cover this.
jp: 工事完了後に請負者が欠陥を修補する義務を負う期間

definition: In CAR/EAR policies, a period after handover during which cover continues for damage caused by the contractor returning to do maintenance.
jp: 引渡し後の保守作業中の損害を補償する期間

definition: The phase of a construction/erection project where completed works are tested before handover. A critical period for insurance.
jp: 完成した工事物件を引渡し前に試験運転する段階

definition: A three-party agreement (principal, obligee, surety) guaranteeing performance of an obligation.
jp: 債務者・債権者・保証人の三者間で債務履行を保証する契約

definition: Insurance protecting a business against non-payment of trade debts by buyers due to insolvency or protracted default.
jp: 取引先の倒産・支払遅延による売掛金の回収不能を補償

definition: Cover for losses arising from political events — expropriation, currency inconvertibility, political violence.
jp: 収用・通貨交換不能・政治的暴力等による損失を補償

definition: Insurance covering loss of money (cash, cheques, etc.) by theft, robbery, or other perils while in transit, on premises, or in a safe.
jp: 現金・小切手等の盗難・強盗等による損失を補償

definition: Insurance covering goods against loss or damage while being transported from one location to another.
jp: 陸上輸送中の貨物の滅失・損傷を補償

definition: Insurance covering accidental breakage of glass windows, doors, and display panels.
jp: ガラス窓・ドア・ディスプレイパネル等の偶然の破損を補償

definition: Compulsory medical insurance for foreign workers in Singapore, covering at least $15,000 per year for inpatient care and day surgery.
jpTerm: 外国人労働者医療保険
jp: SGで義務付けられる外国人労働者の医療保険。入院・日帰り手術を年$15,000以上

definition: A bond required by MOM for certain foreign workers, forfeited if employment conditions are breached.
jp: MOMが一部の外国人労働者に要求する保証金

definition: Ministry of Manpower — Singapore government ministry overseeing employment, workplace safety, and foreign worker policies.
jp: 雇用・職場安全・外国人労働者政策を管轄するSG政府機関

definition: A pass allowing lower-skilled foreign workers to work in Singapore, with specific conditions including insurance requirements.
jp: 低技能外国人労働者の就労許可。保険加入義務あり

definition: A work pass for mid-skilled foreign workers in Singapore, with a minimum salary requirement.
jp: 中技能外国人労働者の就労許可。最低給与要件あり

definition: Insurance providing benefits for accidental death, permanent disablement, and temporary disablement.
jp: 偶然の事故による死亡・後遺障害・一時的障害を補償

definition: Death resulting directly from an accident, independent of any other cause. Typically pays 100% of sum insured.
jp: 事故を直接の原因とする死亡。通常は保険金額の100%

definition: Complete and irreversible inability to engage in any gainful employment. Typically pays 100% of sum insured.
jp: あらゆる業務に永久的に従事不能。通常は保険金額の100%

definition: Permanent loss or loss of use of a body part. Paid as a percentage of sum insured per a schedule.
jp: 身体の一部の永久的喪失。等級表に基づき保険金額の一定割合

definition: Temporary inability to work due to an accident. Typically pays a weekly benefit up to a maximum period.
jp: 事故により一時的に業務不能。通常は週単位の給付

definition: Reimbursement of medical costs incurred as a result of an accident, subject to a specified limit.
jp: 事故に起因する医療費の実費補償（上限額あり）

definition: Group travel cover for business trips — medical expenses, trip cancellation, baggage, emergency evacuation.
jp: 出張時の医療費・旅行取消・手荷物・緊急搬送を補償

definition: Cover for the cost of transporting an injured/ill person to the nearest adequate medical facility.
jp: 負傷者・病人を最寄りの適切な医療施設に搬送する費用

definition: Cover for non-refundable travel costs if a trip must be cancelled due to specified reasons (illness, death, etc.).
jp: 病気・死亡等の理由で旅行を取消した場合の払戻不能費用

definition: Cover for the cost of returning the deceased's body to their home country following death during travel.
jp: 海外での死亡時に遺体を本国に搬送する費用

definition: The person or entity that owns the insurance policy and is responsible for paying the premium.
jp: 保険契約の当事者であり保険料支払義務者

definition: The person or entity designated to receive the insurance benefits or claim proceeds.
jp: 保険金の受取りを指定された者

definition: A person who is not a party to the insurance contract but who may have a claim against the insured.
jp: 保険契約の当事者ではないが被保険者に請求権を有する者

definition: A group of insurers who share risks by combining their resources to underwrite large or unusual risks.
jp: 大規模・特殊リスクを共同で引き受ける保険者の集団

definition: Latin for 'of the utmost good faith' — the fundamental principle underlying insurance contracts.
jp: 保険契約の根底にある基本原則のラテン語表現

definition: In case of multiple causes, the insurer looks for the proximate (nearest effective) cause to determine if the loss is covered.
jp: 複数原因がある場合に最も直接的・有効な原因を特定する判断

definition: When two or more perils operate simultaneously to cause a loss. Coverage depends on the policy terms for each peril.
jp: 複数の危険が同時に作用して損害を生じた場合

definition: A legal phrase used in negotiations meaning that what is said cannot be used as evidence in court if talks fail.
jpTerm: 権利を害することなく
jp: 交渉内容が不調時に法的証拠として使えないことを示す表現

definition: An agreement where the insurer waives its right of subrogation against a specified party.
jp: 保険者が特定の第三者に対する求償権を放棄する合意

definition: When the same risk is insured under two or more policies. The insured cannot recover more than the actual loss.
jp: 同一リスクが複数の保険で付保されている状態

definition: Only parties to a contract can enforce its terms. Third parties generally cannot sue on the contract.
jp: 契約当事者のみが契約上の権利を行使できる原則

definition: A legal principle preventing a party from going back on a representation that another party has relied upon.
jp: 相手方が信頼した表示に反する主張を禁じる法原則

definition: The voluntary relinquishment of a known right. An insurer may waive a policy condition.
jp: 既知の権利を自発的に放棄すること

definition: A clause providing temporary cover while the insured notifies the insurer of a change in risk, subject to additional premium.
jp: リスク変更の通知中も暫定的に補償を継続する条項

definition: A method of calculating reinsurance premium based on the ceding company's actual past loss experience.
jp: 出再者の過去の実績損害率に基づく再保険料算定方式
